title: German Speaking Service Desk Team Lead

summary.lv: Arvato Systems meklē Service Desk komandas vadītāju ar vācu valodas prasmēm, kas vadīs komandas resursu plānošanu, darbosies kā pirmā līmeņa eskalācijas kontakts un nepārtraukti uzlabos pakalpojumus, procesus un rīkus.
summary.en: Arvato Systems is hiring a German-speaking Service Desk Team Lead to manage team resource planning, act as the first-level escalation contact for customers and the team, and continuously improve services, processes and tools.
